name: White Bean Soup with Tomato & Dill
servings: prep time: 5 minutes | cook time:30 to 40 minutes |serves 8

ingredients.item: quarts chicken or vegetable stock or water

method: Drain the beans and put them in a large pot. Add the stock and bring to a boil over high heat, skimming any foam, then reduce the heat to maintain a simmer.

Cook until the beans begin to soften, 30 to 40 minutes, then add the onion, carrots, celery, garlic, bay leaves, orange zest, parsley, dill, tomato sauce, olive oil, and salt to taste. Simmer, uncovered, until the beans are completely tender, about 45 minutes longer depending on their age.
Let cool for 10 minutes, then taste and adjust the seasoning. Remove the bay leaves and orange zest. Ladle into bowls to serve.
